reviews.comment:
largas filas en ambos combustibles, poco personal y pocos surtidores, actualicense ya que de acá a Tilcara no hay otra.
Otro comentario, estaba cargando adelante nuestro una camioneta, se adelanto un camion y empezaron a cargarle al camionero, siendo que era mi turno. Ultima cosa los playeros muy relajados, y toda la paciencia del mundo para reitero largas filas.

(Translated by Google)
Long lines at both fuel stations, insufficient staff, and few pumps. They need to update their systems, as there's no other option between here and Tilcara.

Another comment: a pickup truck was filling up ahead of us, then a truck cut in line and they started filling up the truck driver, even though it was my turn. Finally, the attendants were very relaxed, and I repeat, they had the patience of a saint to handle the long lines.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEMDhxN2xRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Las dos ypf de la ciudad de la quiaca deje muchísimo que desear empleado con mucha desmotivacion para cumplir sus tareas si como trabajarán a la fuerza no xq le guste otra las instalaciones son viejas. Hasta las máquina expendedora de combustible los dueños no se esmeran  y eso hace que dar mal a YPF

(Translated by Google)
The two YPF stations in La Quiaca leave much to be desired. The employees are very unmotivated and don't seem to be doing their jobs; they're forced to work, not because they enjoy it. The facilities are old. Even the fuel pumps are poorly maintained, and the owners don't put any effort into them, which reflects badly on YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURsM2EtT2pnRRAB

reviews.comment:
El playero Sergio cargo combustible a otros autos detrás nuestro. Uno hace la fila 30minutos o más para que carguen primero al de atrás. Una burla.

(Translated by Google)
Sergio, the beach bum, pumped gas for other cars behind us. You wait in line for 30 minutes or more to get the car behind you to fill up first. It's a joke.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNacHAzWnNBRRAB
